assets.prompt_used: Photorealistic documentary-style photograph. Person alone on a back porch or park bench, late afternoon. Not looking at camera — looking slightly off-frame. Coffee cup that has gone cold. Comfortable clothes. No gym imagery anywhere. Subject: Woman, 40-45, suburban, real proportions, naturally tired but warm expression, no gym aesthetic, dressed in everyday clothes. Emotional tone: quiet exhaustion and wistfulness — the feeling of having been meaning to do something for a long time. Lighting: golden hour or soft overcast — warm but not bright. Composition: Two-thirds portrait. Subject fills left two-thirds. Right third is soft background — blurred greenery or suburban neighbourhood.. The visual must support this written hook without illustrating it literally: "You are tired in a way that sleep does not fix anymore." Seasonal context: early spring afternoon light, light jacket, back porch or neighbourhood park, golden hour warmth without harshness. The image speaks to a life moment — no gym advertising visible anywhere in the scene. Photography style: iPhone photo taken quickly without thinking. JPEG compression artifacts visible. Auto white balance slightly off — colour temperature not corrected. Background slightly blown out or underexposed — camera exposed for subject not scene. Subject not perfectly in focus — sharp enough but not tack sharp. Composition slightly tilted 1-2 degrees. One edge of subject partially cut off. No colour grading applied — straight from phone camera roll. Timestamp or notification bar visible in corner is acceptable. The photo was taken by someone who was not thinking about taking a photo. No text, watermarks, logos, or overlaid graphics in the image itself. DO NOT show: gym equipment, workout clothes, anyone in shape, before/after visual cues, staged poses, camera-facing smiles, athletic build, visible abs, gym wear, posed smiling, snow, heavy winter coat, harsh midday sun, beach or summer imagery, stock photo aesthetic, AI-generated look, symmetrical posed composition, fitness model physique, before/after transformation framing, gym equipment as focal point, motivational poster aesthetic, obvious advertising composition. DIFFERENTIATION MANDATE — your image must look nothing like these competitor patterns: Saturated hooks to avoid (do not illustrate these themes): [object Object]; [object Object]; [object Object]. Instead: documentary style, real people, no gym equipment as focal point, no athletic bodies, no transformation imagery, no motivational poster aesthetic. The image must not look like a gym ad at first glance — it must look like a moment from real life.
